error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Brevo trigger requires valid notify URL
symptom: After saving the Brevo trigger node, n8n displays a 'Bad request - please check your parameters' error, indicating an invalid notify URL.
not_this_if: n8n is publicly reachable via HTTPS
root_cause: Brevo requires a valid, publicly accessible webhook URL for its triggers. If n8n is running on localhost or an internal network, Brevo cannot reach it, resulting in the error message.
fix_steps: Ensure n8n is exposed via HTTPS using a service like ngrok or a reverse proxy.
Re-save the Brevo Trigger node to regenerate the notify URL.
Remove and recreate the Brevo Trigger node if it was created before the update.
Check for extra spaces or invalid headers in the Brevo API credentials.
agent_instruction: Expose n8n publicly via HTTPS and re-save the Brevo Trigger node.
